name: private help returns the player help image
description: 验证私聊 help 能返回基础帮助图，作为恢复最常用入口的回归保护。

name: private bind prompt asks for verse username
description: 验证私聊绑定入口会先要求输入 verse 用户名，保持最小可用绑定流程稳定。

name: private bind command succeeds for a verse username
description: 验证私聊绑定命令在提供 4-5 位密码后可以直接完成绑定并返回后续帮助提示。

expected.reply:
已绑定 2048verse 账号：test_user
发送 help 查看可用命令。

name: private bind command asks for pin after username
description: 验证私聊绑定在只提供用户名时会继续要求设置 4-5 位绑定密码。

name: private score query asks for binding first
description: 验证未绑定时的成绩查询会回到绑定引导，不会继续走重流程。

expected.reply: 你还没有绑定账号。请先发送：绑定

name: private submit flow opens when account is bound
description: 验证已绑定用户的提交成绩入口会进入提交流程，而不是直接拒绝。

seed_sql: INSERT INTO players (id, display_name, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (9001, 'BoundUser', 'active', '2026-06-03 09:00:00', '2026-06-03 09:00:00');

INSERT INTO bot_account_bindings (id, bot_platform, bot_user_id, game_platform, player_id, account_key, display_name, is_active, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (9901, 'qq', '10005', '2048verse', 9001, 'test_user', 'test_user', 1, '{}', '2026-06-03 09:00:00', '2026-06-03 09:00:00');

expected.reply:
开始提交成绩。
当前没有可提交成绩的赛事。

name: private floor flow opens when account is bound
description: 验证已绑定用户的 floor 入口会进入锁局流程，而不是直接关闭。

seed_sql: INSERT INTO players (id, display_name, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (9002, 'BoundUser', 'active', '2026-06-03 09:00:00', '2026-06-03 09:00:00');

INSERT INTO bot_account_bindings (id, bot_platform, bot_user_id, game_platform, player_id, account_key, display_name, is_active, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (9902, 'qq', '10006', '2048verse', 9002, 'test_user', 'test_user', 1, '{}', '2026-06-03 09:00:00', '2026-06-03 09:00:00');

expected.reply: 你当前没有可锁局的赛事。

name: private my-score query opens when account is bound
description: 验证已绑定用户的我的成绩查询会进入成绩查询页，而不是继续要求绑定。

seed_sql: INSERT INTO players (id, display_name, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (9003, 'BoundUser', 'active', '2026-06-03 09:00:00', '2026-06-03 09:00:00');

INSERT INTO bot_account_bindings (id, bot_platform, bot_user_id, game_platform, player_id, account_key, display_name, is_active, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (9903, 'qq', '10007', '2048verse', 9003, 'test_user', 'test_user', 1, '{}', '2026-06-03 09:00:00', '2026-06-03 09:00:00');

expected.reply: 你当前没有可查询成绩的已报名赛事。请先报名比赛。
